    <!-- Endpoint path -->
    <text x="80" y="26" font-family="Roboto Mono, monospace" font-size="12" fill="#151515">/api/v1/organes/{id}/structure</text>
    
    <!-- Description -->
    <text x="12" y="50" font-family="Inter, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#666666">Récupère la structure anatomique complète avec segments bronchiques</text>

    <rect x="576" y="18" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="none" stroke="#666666" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- Endpoint 2 -->

    <!-- Endpoint path -->
    <text x="80" y="26" font-family="Roboto Mono, monospace" font-size="12" fill="#151515">/api/v1/organes/{id}/simuler</text>
    
    <!-- Description -->

<svg viewBox="0 0 700 400" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#97ea90"/>

comp_confirm_modal.name: Modal Confirmation
comp_confirm_modal.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 600 280" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <!-- Backdrop gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="backdropGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0f172a" stop-opacity="0.75"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1e293b" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Card shadow -->
    <filter id="cardShadow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="8" stdDeviation="24" flood-color="#0f172a" flood-opacity="0.25"/>
    </filter>
    
    <!-- Success icon gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="iconGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#97ea90"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4ade80"/>
    </linearGradient>
    
    <!-- Confirm button gradient -->
    <linearGradient id="confirmGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#97ea90"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#4ade80"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Backdrop -->
  <rect width="600" height="280" fill="url(#backdropGrad)"/>
  
  <!-- Modal card -->
  <rect x="30" y="20" width="540" height="240" rx="10" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#cardShadow)"/>
  
  <!-- Success icon circle -->
  <circle cx="300" cy="76" r="28" fill="url(#iconGrad)"/>
  
  <!-- Checkmark -->
  <path d="M288 76 L296 84 L312 68" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"/>
  
  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="300" y="132" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, Inter, sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" text-anchor="middle">Confirmer l'action</text>
  
  <!-- Message -->
  <text x="300" y="162" font-family="Inter, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#64748b" text-anchor="middle">Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir procéder ?</text>
  <text x="300" y="182" font-family="Inter, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#64748b" text-anchor="middle">Cette action est irréversible.</text>

  <text x="246" y="235" font-family="Inter, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="600" fill="#475569" text-anchor="middle">Annuler</text>

  <text x="386" y="235" font-family="Inter, system-ui, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" text-anchor="middle">Confirmer</text>
</svg>
